releases.author: Meibbo
releases.description:
## BRAT release candidate

Release candidate for BRAT testing from the `sandbox` branch.

### Included
- Hardening and post-rc.1 stabilization work merged into `sandbox`.
- Node selection, explorer grid/table refinements, mouse gesture routing, view sizing, badges, and message service updates from the hardening line.
- Release metadata includes `1.0.0-beta.25` bridge entry and current `1.0.0-rc.1` manifest/version metadata.

### Verification
- `pnpm run verify`
  - lint: 0 warnings, 0 errors
  - svelte-check: 0 errors, 0 warnings
  - build: `main.js` 484.94 kB, `styles.css` 111.25 kB
  - unit tests: 69 files, 480 tests passed
  - component tests: 36 files, 186 tests passed

### BRAT assets
- `main.js`
- `manifest.json`
- `styles.css`
releases.name: 1.0.0-rc.1 (BRAT rc.1)

releases.author: Meibbo
releases.description:
Codebase Refactor made to improve sustainability. Pasts versions had a lot of hardcoded components inside the svelte files, present approach should make the developer code review process easier with clearer intent of structure and decomposition of monolithic files.

**It is not recommended for normal use to update to this version.** This test release has broken the props explorer. Released for testing purposes, specially for mobile backlogging.
releases.name: 1.0.0-canary.22 (testing release)

releases.author: Meibbo
releases.description: Release for beta.15: Finalized ADD mode behavior, improved property manager modal, implemented pending operation count badges, and localized to EN/ES.
releases.name: 1.0.0-beta.15

releases.author: Meibbo
releases.description: Integration testing infrastructure, stability fixes, and premium UI refinements.
releases.name: ObsiMan v1.0.0-beta.12

releases.author: Meibbo
releases.description:
## What's new in beta.5

### Filters → Property Browser
The Rules tab now shows a live, scrollable list of every property in your vault. Click a property to add a `has_property` filter instantly — no modal. Expand ▶ any property to see its known values; click one to add a `specific_value` filter. The filter tree (active rules) moved to the Active Filters popup (FAB).

### Queue Details → Content Snippet Diff
When a Find & Replace Content operation is queued, opening Queue Details now shows a **Content changes** section below the property diffs. Each affected file renders async snippets with the original match in red and the replacement in green.

### Bug fix
`simulateChanges()` no longer stores `MOVE_FILE` and `FIND_REPLACE_CONTENT` signal keys as fake property entries — this was causing `[object Object]` in the Queue Details diff for content-replace and move operations.

---

**Via BRAT**: enter `Meibbo/ObsiMan-Plugin` → Add Beta Plugin.

**Manual**: download `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css` below.

See [CHANGELOG.md](https://github.com/Meibbo/ObsiMan-Plugin/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md) for full history.
releases.name: ObsiMan 1.0.0-beta.5

releases.author: Meibbo
releases.description:
> ⚠️ This is a beta release. Several known regressions exist. Not recommended for production vaults.

First BRAT-installable release of ObsiMan.

**Known issues**
- Inline rename is broken
- Header checkbox lost CSS styling
- Grid re-render flash (chunked render mode)
- Tags don't render exactly like reading view

**Not yet implemented**
- File diff view, file move, linter tab, Templater support

See [CHANGELOG](https://github.com/Meibbo/ObsiMan-Plugin/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md) for full history.
releases.name: 1.0.0-beta.1 — First public beta
